claimText: The Baku to Belém Roadmap to 1.3T is the official pathway to mobilize the New Collective Quantified Goal (NCQG) of $1.3 trillion per year by 2035.
evidenceExcerpt: Baku to Belém Roadmap to 1.3T is the official pathway to mobilize the NCQG of $1.3 trillion/year by 2035.
examUse: Statement-based question on climate finance targets and the NCQG timeline.
distractorHooks: Target year of 2030 or 2050 instead of 2035
Target amount of $100 billion instead of $1.3 trillion
Associating the roadmap with a different COP agreement

claimText: The climate finance framework targets the tripling of adaptation finance to $120 billion per year.
evidenceExcerpt: The framework targets tripling adaptation finance to $120 billion per year.
examUse: Statement-based question on specific adaptation finance goals.
distractorHooks: Doubling instead of tripling adaptation finance
Targeting $100 billion per year instead of $120 billion

claimText: The Global Goal on Adaptation (GGA) measurement framework tracks progress using indicators across 7 thematic sectors and formalizes a four-stage cycle.
evidenceExcerpt: The GGA measurement framework adopted indicators across 7 thematic sectors: water, food, health, ecosystems, infrastructure, poverty, and culture. Formalizes a four-stage cycle.
examUse: Feature-based question on the structure and scope of the GGA measurement framework.
distractorHooks: Incorrect number of thematic sectors (e.g., 5 or 10)
Incorrect cycle stages (e.g., two-stage or five-stage cycle)

claimText: The Global Goal on Adaptation (GGA) was established under Article 7.1 of the Paris Agreement (2015).
evidenceExcerpt: The Global Goal on Adaptation (GGA) was established under Article 7.1 of the Paris Agreement (2015).
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question on the origin treaty of the GGA.
distractorHooks: Established under the Glasgow Climate Pact
Established under the original UNFCCC 1992 framework

claimText: The Baku Adaptation Roadmap establishes adaptation work for the period 2026-2028, leading up to the next Global Stocktake of the Paris Agreement.
evidenceExcerpt: Baku Adaptation Roadmap establishes adaptation work for 2026-2028 until the next Global Stocktake.
examUse: Statement-based question on the timeline and purpose of the Baku Adaptation Roadmap.
distractorHooks: Leading up to the Net-Zero 2050 target instead of the Global Stocktake
